headline: Red Robin, CAVA, and Darden Shares Are Soaring, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks jumped in the afternoon session after Iran announced the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz, which triggered a sharp drop in crude oil prices and signaled an easing of inflationary pressures on operating margins.
